overview.description: The Vanguard Target Maturity 2036 Corporate Bond ETF (VBCJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of USD-denominated corporate bonds maturing between January and December 2036. The fund will terminate on December 15, 2036 VBCJ was launched on Mar 10, 2026 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: ICE 2036 Maturity US Corporate Constrained Index
